parents.subject: LU-15714 pcc: reserve layout intent flags for PCCRO

commit.subject: LU-15731 pcc: add connection flag OBD_CONNECT2_LAYOUT_BODY
commit.message:
LU-15731 pcc: add connection flag OBD_CONNECT2_LAYOUT_BODY

Add a new connection flag OBD_CONNECT2_LAYOUT_BODY for layout
intent in which it packs @mdt_body in the request message for
permission checking.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Qian Yingjin <qian@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I4d382b5b6e657ed8b55ec4dce9815e5238091a38
